meaning: 提耳堡[荷兰南部城市](或译蒂尔堡)
examples: He asks a payment in advance of 750 euros, to do the first investigation in Tilburg.
He also taught for long spells at Maastricht University and the University of Tilburg.
Van Tilburg said his research proves that boredom can promote behaviour that benefits society.
"Politically speaking, that's very important, " said Harald Benink, a professor of finance at Tilburg University.
Finally, what I find truly amazing is that he was teaching the Ethics course at Tilburg University.
